description: CompositionIndigo splash jeans made of a cotton and lycra blend fabric, has two insert pockets on the front witha patch pocket inside the right one and metallic buttons on the pocket ends, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, loops on the waist and has a metal zipper and button closureFitRegular fit Low rise Straight legWash careTurn inside out before washingand dryingMachine wash cold separatelyusing a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or dry flat in shadeWarm ironIf you're a denim person, then these indigo splash jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. With a low waist, great regular fit and stretchable fabric, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team thiswith casual shirts and sports shoes or funky t-shirts and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans oflength 44"Height: 6', Waist: 32", Hips:40"
